evaluators.name: Crypto Fraud Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Crypto Fraud 2024' reading list containing the 3 most recent qualifying cryptocurrency fraud working papers (2021+, ≥50 citations).

evaluators.name: Larger Compact Credit Card Fraud Dataset Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added to the dataset cart the credit card fraud micro transaction dataset with the most observations among non-commercial research datasets having fewer than 50 variables.

evaluators.name: Tax Evasion APA Citation Export Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Tax Evasion Assignment' citation export list containing an APA-style citation for a qualifying Latin America tax evasion journal article in a journal with impact factor > 3 (2015–2022).

evaluators.name: Ponzi Schemes Saved Search Alert Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a saved search alert named 'Ponzi Schemes 2010+' for Ponzi scheme working papers from 2010 onward with weekly in-site notifications.

evaluators.name: Money Laundering Authors Follow Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user followed at least two authors whose topics include money laundering and who each have at least 5 publications.

evaluators.name: FS Fraud Detection Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'FS Fraud Detection 2018–2023' article collection containing at least 4 qualifying open-access, English, 2018–2023 journal articles on financial statement fraud detection, all with downloadable full text.

evaluators.name: Retracted LIBOR Case Study Bookmark Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bookmarked a retracted LIBOR manipulation article and tagged it with 'case study'.

evaluators.name: European Financial Crime Conference Planner Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added to the planner an upcoming European financial crime or fraud conference between September and December 2025 with a registration fee under 500 (nominal).
